current_commit_message: Use jsonpatch to provide a JSON patch document
Compare JSON strings as JSON instead of strings.
Implement copy magic methods on Model
Allow a resolver to be set on the Model
Replace setuptools with poetry for packaging/deps
Enforce utf-8 encoding when reading files into setup.py
use io module for handling encoding while opening file in setup.py
Apply 'no blanket NOQA statements' fixes enforced by pre-commit hook
Apply isort import order fixes enforced by pre-commit hook
Add tests for DeprecationWarnings issued by Model.changes
Use Python 2.7-friendly version of assessing warnings
Drop tests for python 2 related logic
Maintain the validator instance to speedup schema validation process (#55)
Don't override values set in the constructor.
Allow default values in nested properties.
Fix nested properties with initalization values.
